name: Chicken with Grape Mustard Cream
recipeIngredient: 4 Boneless, skinless chicken breast halves (~1 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place mushrooms, butter and onion in an 8-inch square glass dish. Cover with plastic wrap.
2. Microwave on high for 2 minutes, stirring midway through cooking.
3. Arrange chicken on top of mushroom mixture. Add wine, marjoram, salt, and pepper.
4. Re-cover and microwave on high for 5-6 minutes, or until chicken is no longer pink.
5. Combine cream, mustard, and flour in a 2-cup glass measure.
6. Drain liquid from chicken into the mixture; re-cover chicken and set aside.
7. Stirring after each minute, microwave on high for 3-4 minutes, or until mixture thickens and bubbles.
8. Stir grapes into sauce and microwave on high for 1-2 minutes, or until grapes are heated through.
9. Slice chicken crosswise and serve on warm plates topped with sauce.
